brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Filter to just Hemiunu — that name in the clients table. Order by year. Oldest first. I want the whole story end to end.

expected.sql: SELECT e.era, e.year, r.detail, r.location, r.payment FROM chrono_engagements e INNER JOIN chrono_clients c ON e.client_id = c.client_id INNER JOIN era_records r ON r.engagement_id = e.engagement_id WHERE c.name = 'Hemiunu' ORDER BY e.year

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many. Filter to just Hemiunu — match c.name.'
Carol: 'You found nobody. Single quotes around the name.'
Carol: 'Right rows, wrong order. Oldest first. e.year ascending.'
Carol: 'Single quotes around Hemiunu. Order by e.year — that's the column on the engagements table.'
Carol: 'WHERE c.name = the name. ORDER BY e.year. Five rows in chronological order.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Carol reads down the list. Two and a half thousand BCE. 1347. 1890. 1927. And then she stops. 'Twenty twenty-six. Chrono HQ.' She doesn't read the rest aloud. 'We're not chasing him through history. He's been in our basement the entire time.'
